summary: Bot handles core financial logic well and maintains consistent Russian voice, but exhibits critical data state mismatches, allows duplicate transaction logging, and shows ambiguity around bill vs. expense boundaries.
strengths: Consistent Russian language and warm, conversational tone throughout
Correct arithmetic on balance calculations and daily spend rates (e.g., ₽11,875/day)
Proactive safety check when user entered ₽250k medicines (caught likely typo)
Clear confirmation UI pattern (preview → buttons → edit state)
Reasonable delegation of features outside scope (reminders, Excel export)
failures: CRITICAL: Bills stored at ₽1.5M, ₽80K, ₽60K (turn [10] final state) but user input was ₽15,000, ₽800, ₽600 — 100x scaling error on all three recurring bills
CRITICAL: User attempts to log same ₽450 + ₽35 transactions twice (turns [7], [59]) — bot accepts both without deduplication check or warning
Medicine bill added to state ([50]) but never confirmed in final state output — data integrity gap
Turn [46] returns English error message ('That's more than your balance') in Russian-only conversation
Ambiguous intent capture: turns [31], [39], [53] show 'Отменить' (undo) taps that appear context-free and reverse recent confirmations without user request
Turn [20] promises goal-tracking help but bot has no goals subsystem — creates false capability expectation
Daily spend rate unstable: ₽11,875 → ₽11,920 → ₽11,871.50 → ₽11,555 → cycles back to ₽11,875 despite confirmed transaction adds (suggests state rollback or calculation error)

bug_candidates.title: Bill amount 100x scale error
bug_candidates.symptom: User enters ₽15,000 rent; system stores ₽1,500,000. Same for internet (₽800 → ₽80,000) and mobile (₽600 → ₽60,000).

bug_candidates.title: Duplicate transaction acceptance
bug_candidates.symptom: User logs ₽450 + ₽35 identical expenses at turns [7] and [59]; bot accepts both without dedup or user prompt.

bug_candidates.title: Medicine bill missing from final state
bug_candidates.symptom: Turn [50] confirms ₽25,000 medicines added; final state shows only 3 bills (rent, internet, mobile), not 4.

bug_candidates.title: Language code mismatch in error path
bug_candidates.symptom: Turn [46] returns English error message in Russian conversation: '_That's more than your balance — really ₽250,000.00?_'

bug_candidates.title: Unexplained undo confirmations
bug_candidates.symptom: Turns [31], [39], [53] show 'Отменить' (undo) without prior user input; reverses confirmed transactions.

bug_candidates.title: Unstable daily spend rate calculation
bug_candidates.symptom: Daily rate swings: ₽11,875 → ₽11,920 → ₽11,871.50 → ₽11,555 → back to ₽11,875 despite monotonic transaction adds. Suggests state loss or incorrect aggregation logic.

bug_candidates.title: False goal-tracking capability promise
bug_candidates.symptom: Turn [20] bot says 'Цели пока не встроены' but offers detailed savings strategy, creating impression of feature support.
